headline: Retatrutide Crosses the Surgical Threshold, but the Real Race Has Just Started
summary: Dallas, TX, April 29, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- PatentVest today released its latest PatentVest Pulse: “The Last 20%: Retatrutide, the Glucagon Paradox, and the Race to Own Surgery-Level Weight Loss Without Surgery.” In April 2026, Eli Lilly’s retatrutide delivered 28.7% mean weight loss, the first non-surgical therapy to match bariatric outcomes. headline: Eli Lilly’s AI Genetic Medicine Deal And What It Means For Valuation
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) has entered a large scale, multi program partnership with AI company Profluent to develop next generation genetic medicines. The collaboration focuses on using AI designed enzymes and recombinases to enable more precise and scalable DNA edits across multiple programs. The deal expands Lilly’s push into digital biology and artificial intelligence in drug development, beyond recent M&A or product specific news. Eli Lilly comes into this agreement with Profluent as an...
